## 📋 PR Checklist

**Before submitting, confirm all items below:**

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style (ESLint + Prettier pass: `npm run lint` & `npm run format:check`)
- [ ] I have added / updated JSDoc comments for new functions
- [ ] No `console.log()` statements left in production code (warnings and errors are OK)
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys, tokens, or secrets

### Testing
- [ ] I have added unit tests for new utility functions / services
- [ ] All existing tests pass: `npm run test`
- [ ] For UI changes: I have manually tested in Chrome and Firefox

### Documentation
- [ ] I updated `README.md` if I added new features or setup steps
- [ ] I added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` (if applicable)

### UI Changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Screenshots / GIFs attached below showing before & after
- [ ] Works on mobile (375px) and desktop (1440px)
- [ ] Keyboard navigable (Tab + Enter/Space)
- [ ] No color contrast regressions

---
